game.title: Scrabble Game State
game.description: Represents a real-time Scrabble game, including player scores, tile racks, board placement, and turns.

id.description: The unique ID of the game room

status.description: One of waiting, active, finished, or abandoned

turnIndex.description: The index of the player whose turn it is currently

players.description: The active players in the game with score and individual racks

lastMove.description: Metadata of the last played turn

/games/{gameId}.description: Active and finished Scrabble game lobbies
